LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT DAUN A. DEVORE'S MOTION TO TAX COSTS IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS PRESENTED NO EVIDENCE OR ARGUMENT SHOWING THAT ANY CHALLENGED ITEM IN THE BILL OF COSTS IS IMPROPER AND PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE SUPPORT EACH ITEM. IN ANY EVENT DEFENDANT'S MOTION IS UNTIMELY. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. (THE COURT IS ALSO AWARE THAT THE MOVING PARTY THROUGH INFORMAL CONTACT WITH THE COURT HAS ASKED FOR A CONTINUANCE DUE TO MEDICAL ISSUES BUT WAS INFORMED TO GO THROUGH THE EX-PARTE TELEPHONE APPEARANCE AND THERE IS NO BASIS FOR THE COURT NOT TO PROCEED WITH THIS MATTER.) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR 8189

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Tax Costs
Off Calendar Jul-13-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT DAUN A. DEVORE'S Motion To Tax Costs IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS PRESENTED NO EVIDENCE OR ARGUMENT SHOWING THAT ANY CHALLENGED ITEM IN THE BILL OF COSTS IS IMPROPER AND PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE SUPPORT EACH ITEM. IN ANY EVENT DEFENDANT'S MOTION IS UNTIMELY. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189

(THE COURT IS ALSO AWARE THAT THE MOVING PARTY THROUGH INFORMAL CONTACT WITH THE COURT HAS ASKED FOR A CONTINUANCE DUE TO MEDICAL ISSUES BUT WAS INFORMED TO GO THROUGH THE EX-PARTE TELEPHONE APPEARANCE AND THERE IS NO BASIS FOR THE COURT NOT TO PROCEED WITH THIS MATTER.) =301/PJB/PM
